---
title: "Elisama Oliveira Freitas"
description: "Sou doutoranda em engenharia civil com foco em análise de durabilidade de concretos"
about:
   template: trestles
   links:
    - icon: Linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elisama-freitas-316156360?utm_source=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=member_ios
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      url: https://github.com/elisama-of/EstatisticaPPEC/tree/main
image: PROFILE.jpeg
